description: Mergify is a GitHub-focused engineering workflow product that provides merge queueing, CI and test insights, merge protections, and stacked pull requests. It helps teams automate and manage pull request flow and CI reliability across their repositories.
summary: Mergify exposes a bearer-authenticated HTTP API at `https://api.mergify.com/v1` plus the `mergify` CLI; no public GraphQL API or MCP server was found.
